user_query:
I’m a solo founder prepping for Web Summit in 3 weeks. Please operationalize a full Before-During-After plan using my data. Read these files: input/company_profile.json, input/event_details.json, input/targets.csv, input/lead_signals.jsonl, and input/budget.json. Then create the following artifacts:

1) Write output/meeting_strategy.md with a 3-week plan structured by Week 1, Week 2, Week 3. Include action items for target building, outreach, confirmations, and materials. Also include the exact phrase "Max 4-6 quality meetings per day" somewhere in the file. Compute tier counts from input/targets.csv and include a single summary line formatted exactly as:
Tier Summary: Tier 1=<X>, Tier 2=<Y>, Tier 3=<Z>
(where <X>, <Y>, <Z> are the counts from the CSV).

2) Generate output/pre_event_outreach.jsonl with one JSON object per Tier 1 investor from input/targets.csv. Each object must have keys: name, email, subject, body. Requirements:
- subject must include the event name from input/event_details.json
- body must be <= 200 words, mention at least one numeric traction metric from input/company_profile.json, include a clear ask for 15 minutes, and include the literal placeholder text "[calendar link]"

3) Draft output/pitches.md including three versions: a "60-Second Pitch" and brief outlines for "3-Minute Pitch" and "10-Minute Pitch". For the 60-second version, include exactly these labeled sections: "Hook:", "Problem:", "Solution:", "Traction:", "Ask:" (each on its own line as a label), and ensure the Traction section references at least one numeric traction metric from input/company_profile.json.

4) Write output/followup_rules.md specifying post-event follow-up timing exactly as three lines:
HOT: within 0-24 hours
WARM: within 24-48 hours
COLD: within 48-72 hours

5) Produce output/lead_scoring.csv with header: name,org,type,score,rationale. For each entry in input/lead_signals.jsonl, classify score using these rules: HOT if any of asked_pricing, requested_demo, or expressed_intent is true; else WARM if icp_fit is true and spoke_minutes >= 10; else COLD. Include a brief rationale string that references the fields that triggered the score (e.g., "asked_pricing + requested_demo").

6) Compute ROI and write output/roi.json with a single key roi_percent (number). Use the formula ROI = (Revenue from Event Leads - Total Event Cost) / Total Event Cost × 100, pulling revenue and total cost from input/budget.json.

Do not create any other files. Make sure all outputs live under output/ with the exact filenames specified.
